title: feat: capture full redirect URL in BYOP API key metadata
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tracing the source
gist.blurb: We're now capturing the full journey. API keys generated via BYOP now remember their specific redirect URL, giving us better maps of where traffic flows.
gist.summary: Updated the authorization flow to capture the full redirect URL in API key metadata instead of just the hostname.
gist.impact: This enables precise tracking of which specific application pages or routes are generating keys, improving analytics and attribution.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a detective or cartographer, tracing a line from a key back to a specific point on a map. The idea of 'origin' or 'source'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot holding a golden key with a long digital tag attached to it, looking at a pixelated map on the wall. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Bee mascot with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Pixel text: 'ORIGIN'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
